issue.title: feat(user): Add user module domain repository and service
issue.body: User module including upsertUser, getUserById, and deleteUser. Synchronization with Clerk via webhooks.

issue.title: feat(auth): Add middleware for app and admin route protection
issue.body: Route protection for (app)/ and (admin)/. Verification of Clerk userId and admin role.

issue.title: test(user): Add unit tests for user module
issue.body: Scenarios: creation, update, and userId not found.

issue.title: feat(group): Add Prisma models Group Membership and Debt
issue.body: Add Group, Membership and Debt models to prisma/schema.prisma. Add MemberRole enum (OWNER/MEMBER). Document all decisions in docs/guides/prisma-schema-decisions.md before commit.

issue.title: feat(group): Add group module domain repository and service
issue.body: Group module with createGroup, addMember, removeMember. Entities: Group and Membership with OWNER/MEMBER roles. Files: group.domain.ts, group.dto.ts, group.mapper.ts, group.repository.ts, group.schema.ts, group.service.ts, group.actions.ts, group.types.ts.

issue.title: feat(group): Add expense splitting logic and debt tracking
issue.body: Methods: addExpenseToGroup, splitEqually, splitCustom, settleDebt. Typed errors for invalid amounts or missing members. Update Debt model balance after each settlement.

issue.title: feat(group): Add group scope-builder for filtered queries
issue.body: Filters by period (startDate/endDate), category, and member. Used by group.repository.ts for composable queries.

issue.title: test(group): Add unit tests for group module
issue.body: Scenarios: equal split, custom split, partial settlement, unauthorized member. Apply double mock pattern: jest.mock('../group.repository') + jest.mock('@/lib/prisma').

issue.title: feat(group): Add group dashboard UI
issue.body: app/[locale]/(app)/groups/ with _components: group-list.tsx, group-card.tsx, expense-list.tsx, debt-summary.tsx. Server Components + Client Components only for interactions. i18n for all labels.

issue.title: chore(i18n): Add group namespace to messages and request config
issue.body: Add messages/it/group.json and messages/en/group.json. Update i18n/request.ts with group namespace using nested object pattern — never flat spread.

issue.title: feat(scripts): Improve bulk-issues script with dynamic logs and error handling
issue.body:
Improve bulk-issues.ts and create-issue.ts with:
- Dynamic log header reading version, author and repo URL from package.json
- Typed and descriptive errors (GitHub CLI not found, invalid label, malformed JSON)
- Skip failed issues and continue instead of blocking
- Final report with created, skipped and failed counts
- List of failed issues in the final summary
- Automatic rollback on partial failure

issue.title: feat: extract single-issue operations to lib/single-issue.ts
issue.body:
Extract single-issue operations into dedicated module:
- validateInput() for CLI argument validation
- checkGitHubCLI() for CLI availability verification
- createIssue() for GitHub CLI execution with error handling
- parseIssueNumber() for URL parsing
- renameIssue() for title standardization
- Enable better testability and separation of concerns

issue.title: feat: add buildGitHubCommand() to lib/cmd-utils.ts
issue.body:
Extend command utilities with GitHub CLI command builder:
- Add buildGitHubCommand() function for safe command construction
- Handle assignee and labels with proper escaping
- Complement existing buildCommandArgs() for bulk operations
- Ensure consistent command building across the codebase

issue.title: feat: add single-issue reporting functions to lib/report.ts
issue.body:
Extend reporting module with single-issue display functions:
- Add printSingleIssueHeader() for formatted project info
- Add printSingleIssueSuccess() for success confirmation
- Maintain consistent formatting with bulk operations
- Support different execution modes (test/dry-run/real)

issue.title: refactor: modularize create-issue.ts using extracted functions
issue.body:
Refactor create-issue.ts to use modular architecture:
- Replace inline code with imports from lib/ modules
- Use readPackageMeta() for metadata extraction
- Use validateInput() and checkGitHubCLI() for validation
- Use buildGitHubCommand() for command construction
- Use printSingleIssueHeader/Success() for output formatting
- Reduce file size from ~120 to ~45 lines

issue.title: docs: update create-issue.md for modular architecture
issue.body:
Update technical documentation to reflect new modular design:
- Document module interactions and dependencies
- Update execution flow showing lib/ usage
- Add module dependencies section
- Update key concepts for separation of concerns
- Maintain consistency with bulk-issue.md structure
